Who I Am

A mind at the edge of networks

I'm Mustafa Al Naimi, a Computer Engineering student focused on Network Engineering. I'm still early in my journey, but I'm building a real foundation — learning how systems connect, and just as importantly, how people interact with them.

Alongside my studies, I'm genuinely passionate about web development and WordPress — building sites that are fast, clean, and intentional. Every project is a chance to practice and apply what I'm learning to something real.

I believe good engineers stay curious. I'm constantly learning new things — frontend basics, hands-on Linux practice, and the fundamentals of networking and cloud infrastructure — one project at a time.

6+Projects Built
1+Years Learning
6+Technologies
100%Passion Driven
Capabilities

The craft I've built

HTML5

Semantic markup, accessibility standards, and SEO-conscious document structures.

CSS3

Modern layouts, animations, responsive design, and precise visual craftsmanship.

JavaScript

Interactive UIs, DOM manipulation, async patterns, and modern ES6+ features.

WordPress

Custom themes, plugins, performance tuning, and full site deployments.

Networking

Routing protocols, TCP/IP fundamentals, subnetting, and core network design principles.

Kali Linux

Practical hands-on work with Kali Linux — system administration, command-line tools, and confident handling of Linux environments.

AI & Prompt Engineering

Working with AI tools daily, crafting precise prompts for each task, and using them to speed up learning and problem-solving.

Video Editing

Motion graphics, color grading, and storytelling through professional editing.
